inputs.label: Sample Mean (x̄)
inputs.businessContext: Observed average of the sample data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Observed average of the sample data.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne observée des données de l'échantillon.
businessContext_i18n.es: Media observada de los datos de la muestra

inputs.label: Null Hypothesis Mean (μ₀)
inputs.businessContext: Hypothesized population mean under the null hypothesis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hypothesized population mean under the null hypothesis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır hipotezi altında varsayılan popülasyon ortalaması.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne de la population hypothétique sous l'hypothèse nulle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Media poblacional hipotética bajo la hipótesis nula.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط المجتمع المفترض تحت الفرضية الصفرية.

inputs.label: Population Standard Deviation (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Known standard deviation of the population. For unknown σ, use sample standard deviation with t-test; this tool assumes normal distribution.

businessContext_i18n.en: Known standard deviation of the population. For unknown σ, use sample standard deviation with t-test; this tool assumes normal distribution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Popülasyonun bilinen standart sapması. σ bilinmiyorsa, t-testi ile örnek standart sapması kullanın; bu araç normal dağılım varsayar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bekannte Standardabweichung der Population. Bei unbekanntem σ verwenden Sie die Stichprobenstandardabweichung mit t-Test; dieses Tool setzt Normalverteilung voraus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type connu de la population. Pour σ inconnu, utilisez l'écart type de l'échantillon avec un test t ; cet outil suppose une distribution normale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar conocida de la población. Para σ desconocida, use la desviación estándar muestral con prueba t; esta herramienta asume distribución normal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المعياري المعروف للمجتمع. إذا كان σ غير معروف، استخدم الانحراف المعياري للعينة مع اختبار t؛ هذه الأداة تفترض التوزيع الطبيعي.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of observations in the sample.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of observations in the sample.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Beobachtungen in der Stichprobe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de observaciones en la muestra.

inputs.label: Significance Level (α)
inputs.businessContext: Probability threshold for rejecting the null hypothesis (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability threshold for rejecting the null hypothesis (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır hipotezini reddetmek için olasılık eşiği (örneğin %5 için 0,05).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrscheinlichkeitsschwelle für die Ablehnung der Nullhypothese (z. B. 0,05 für 5 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Seuil de probabilité pour rejeter l'hypothèse nulle (par exemple, 0,05 pour 5 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Umbral de probabilidad para rechazar la hipótesis nula (ej., 0.05 para 5%).
businessContext_i18n.ar: حد الاحتمال لرفض الفرضية الصفرية (مثل 0.05 لـ 5%).

inputs.label: Tail Type
inputs.businessContext: 1 for one-tailed test, 2 for two-tailed test.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for one-tailed test, 2 for two-tailed test.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek kuyruklu test için 1, çift kuyruklu test için 2.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 für einseitigen Test, 2 für zweiseitigen Test.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 pour un test unilatéral, 2 pour un test bilatéral.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 para prueba de una cola, 2 para prueba de dos colas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 لاختبار أحادي الذيل، 2 لاختبار ثنائي الذيل.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
